content:
🚀 Antibot-Detector | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with real-time insights into the bot detection and anti-scraping mechanisms employed by websites, aiding security researchers and web developers.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time detection of anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and fingerprinting • Multi-layer detection system (DOM, Network, Payload, JS Hooks, Window Properties) • Support for major anti-bot systems (Cloudflare, Akamai, DataDome, etc.)
📖 Summary: This Chrome extension detects and analyzes various anti-bot systems, CAPTCHAs, and browser fingerprinting techniques in real-time. It provides users with confidence scores, detection history, and advanced tools to understand how websites protect themselves from automated access.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

💡 colota | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Users who want to track their location privately and send it to their own server, rather than relying on third-party services.
✨ Key Features: • Self-Hosted • Privacy First • Works Offline • Offline Maps • Scheduled Export
📖 Summary: Colota is a self-hosted GPS location tracking application for Android devices. It allows users to send their location data to a private server, offering features like offline functionality, geofencing, and encrypted backups, all while prioritizing user privacy with no analytics or telemetry.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 cursify | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enhancing the visual appeal and interactivity of React and Next.js web applications through custom cursor animations and dynamic UI components.
✨ Key Features: • Cursor animation library • React and Next.js compatibility • TypeScript support • Reusable UI components • Animation and interactive elements
📖 Summary: This repository provides a collection of reusable UI components and animations for React and Next.js applications, focusing on enhancing user experience with dynamic visual effects. It includes components for animations, interactive elements, and layout utilities, designed to be easily integrated into modern web development projects.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
